reviews.comment:
Falta de aire acondicionado , lleno  de moscas el lugar  y la comida al plato  la mayor decepcion !!! No se los recomiendo para nada !!! Triste pero cierto  el puré de papas no es puré,  son trozos de papas y el omelet totalmente manchado con la suciedad del sartén una verguenza !!!

(Translated by Google)
No air conditioning, the place was full of flies, and the food was a huge disappointment! I absolutely do not recommend it! Sad but true, the mashed potatoes weren't mashed, they were chunks of potato, and the omelet was completely stained with dirt from the pan—a disgrace!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxNThmLUlnEAE
